name: Obstacle (keep-out)
status: DRAFT - box form (rectangle footprint); schema section 2 supports a footprint polygon. Placeholder size.

geometry.note: Keep-out box (rectangle footprint x height). schema section 2 Obstacle = footprintPolygon[] + height; rectangle is the simple case.
geometry.frame: Datum = pose {position,yaw} at base centre; local X = width, Y = depth, Z up.
geometry.colours: column/wall/machine = neutral greys; full LOD adds a hazard-amber cap.
